The question is asking to determine which stadium was the last to be opened. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "opened" column, which contains numerical years, in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(opened) operation. This will allow us to see the stadium that was opened most recently (the largest year) at the top of the sorted list.
The stadium with the most recent opening year in the table is Allianz Riviera, which opened in 2013. Therefore, the last stadium to be opened is Allianz Riviera.

judge_thought:
Explanation: 
The question asks for the stadium that was last opened (most recent opening date). The relevant column is "opened". 
From the original table, here are the latest opening years:
2013 - Allianz Riviera (Row 9)
2012 - Grand Stade Lille Métropole (Row 3) and Grand Stade du Havre (Row 16)
2011 - MMArena (Row 17) and Stade du Hainaut (Row 18)
Allianz Riviera was opened in 2013, which is the most recent opening year among all the stadiums listed.
